{{CargoOrgan
|name=Thermotactic Sensory Cell
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10807
|idx=7
|description=From the tiniest cell to entire organs and systems, all living beings are bound by bioelectric currents—and where charges move, magnetic fields are born…
|skill=
|hp=370
|def=45
|atk=84
|rush=41
|gene1=In explorations, {race} RUSH +20
|gene2=During exploration, Fire DMG +60
|gene7=Fire DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
